events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: "rework without disposition" on a manufacturing floor with Andon & quality response. Rework without disposition means someone is doing rework without proper quality disposition/approval. This is non-compliant. Work is in-progress. Component conditions: likely "non-compliant" and possibly "installed-defective". Decision should be fail because it's non-compliant. Risk: high. Work stage: rework. Percent complete: maybe 50. Value 0. Confidence high.
